DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.desc: Go inside the meeting room with the NWO, follow along with one of the newest rebels as he heads to class for the first time and go behind the scenes of a Rich Rodriguez practice.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football

programme.title: Movie: Safe House
programme.desc: A rookie CIA agent finds himself on the run with a fugitive after the safe house he was protecting is attacked by mercenaries.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Legend
programme.desc: A Scientist, who seems to be the lone survivor of a plague that hit years ago, struggles to stay alive among the monsters and find a cure to the disease at the same time.

programme.title: Movie: Elysium
programme.desc: A man takes on a mission to try and bring equality to the polarized worlds of the future.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Movie: Elysium
programme.desc: A man takes on a mission to try and bring equality to the polarized worlds of the future.

programme.title: Movie: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: An elite team of peacekeepers attempt to kidnap a crime lord's top lieutenants in Somalia.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween H2O: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: Twenty years after killings on Halloween, Laurie Strode has built a new life for herself and her son, but her psychotic brother, Michael Myers, is after her again.

programme.title: Movie: Escape From New York
programme.desc: A condemned criminal and former war hero is offered his freedom if he can rescue the President of the United States from the walled prison island of Manhattan after a terrorist brings down the President's plane.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Seven Thirty-Seven
programme.desc: Walt and Jesse are vividly reminded of Tuco’s volatile nature, and try to figure a way out of their business partnership. Hank attempts to mend fences between the estranged Marie and Skyler.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Grilled
programme.desc: Walt and Jesse find themselves in close quarters with an unhinged Tuco. Marie and Hank comfort Skyler, who is distraught over Walt’s disappearance. Hank pays a visit to Mrs. Pinkman on some not-so-official business.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Bit by a Dead Bee
programme.desc: Walt and Jesse cover their tracks, but as a result, both of their financial situations suffer. Meanwhile, Hank and his DEA colleagues may have a break in their meth investigation.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Down
programme.desc: Walt tries to reconnect with his family. Still suspicious of her husband's actions, Skyler keeps her distance. Jesse finds himself without a place to live and struggles to cope.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Breakage
programme.desc: Tensions and bills mount at the White household. Hank makes progress at work, but struggles with some residual effects from his encounter with Tuco. Jesse takes charge and assembles a crew of dealers to get their product out on the streets.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Peekaboo
programme.desc: Walt returns to work. Skinny Pete gets ripped off and when Jesse steps in to "handle it," he gets more than he bargained for. Skyler finally gets to thank Gretchen for paying for Walt's treatment.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Negro y Azul
programme.desc: Rumors fly about Jesse's recent actions as he and Walt discuss expanding their business into new territories. Hank struggles to fit in with his new co-workers in El Paso. Skyler pursues a new job opportunity that reconnects her with a former colleague.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Better Call Saul
programme.desc: Walt and Jesse seek the advice of a shady lawyer; Hank returns home with a troubled mind.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true story of musician Tupac Shakur's life. Raised by activists, the young black man grew up to be a poet, actor and one of the world's most successful rappers whose impact has only grown since his death, turning him into a global cultural icon.

programme.title: Movie: Obsessed
programme.desc: After getting a promotion, a hard-working businessman, happy with his life, is briefly attracted to a temporary employee assigned to him. He quickly loses interest when she begins to stalk him and his family.

programme.title: Movie: Good Deeds
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's predictable life changes when he meets a single mother who lives a modest life.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her 'boyfriend' for the week.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart

programme.title: Supernanny: Braido Family
programme.desc: Working parents, Jessica and CJ Braido, feel they're being overrun by their four small children and are at a loss at how to come together on their parenting perspectives.

programme.title: Supernanny: Corry Family
programme.desc: The Corry's are a military family struggling to discipline their four daughters.

programme.title: Supernanny: Richardson Family
programme.desc: The Richardson's have found themselves at a loss managing their six fiercely independent kids and can't keep up with the mess that follows them.

programme.title: Supernanny: Ostler Family
programme.desc: The Ostler's are struggling to control their two rambunctious boys while also still grieving the loss of their first child.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by My Neighbor
programme.desc: A woman finds herself the target of an obsessive neighbourhood watchman who aims to prove he's the best man to protect her, even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Monster Under the Bed
programme.desc: When three hotel workers don't turn up for their shift, a bizarre series of discoveries reveals a twisted workplace love triangle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Blueberry Connoisseur
programme.desc: Mike creates an 'interesting' flavour at the Jelly Belly Candy Company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Vomit Island Workers
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty as he braves the untamed world of Vomit Island, a place where few have ever been and even fewer would ever want to go. Mike's mission is to help band and count newly hatched Herons on the filth-covered island.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Barber
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and the crew travel to the Spring Brook Ranch in Kalispell, Montana to join forces with a yak and bison rancher who put him to work.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner
programme.desc: Mike goes underground packing explosives into a wall of salt and blowing it up in order to break up the salt into small blocks. Mike masters the dirty job of salt mining and gets a new respect for the people who get dirty so the public can have salt.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Nothin' But Mammals ...
programme.desc: A triathlete, a former football player, and an elite bow hunter compete face to face with three of America's most powerful land predators. As the humans attempt to claim the last coveted spot in next week's finale, one sets a stunning new course record.

programme.title: Moonshiners: On the Run
programme.desc: The moonshiners are on the run as law enforcement deploys new ways of tracking them down. Aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail for Tickle, who scrambles for cover. Marking a first for the series, two shiners get busted by cops on camera.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Setbacks and Second Chances
programme.desc: Moonshine setbacks are the order of the day. After a disastrous first run Mark and Digger seek redemption on their 3-pot still. Tim enlists Tickle as JT's moonshine mentor.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Pi-Rat Paradise

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Bass Fishing with Houston
programme.desc: Jimmy, his seven-year old Houston, and his dad Daniel fish for bass in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Marines - Chad Shevlin
programme.desc: Chad Shevlin shares how he survived being hit in the face by a rocket-propelled grenade.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: What it takes to be a Contender - Part 1
programme.desc: Captains George Clark, Jr. and Lain Goodwin share their high anticipation for season three of The Fish Guyz over breakfast at Doc's Diner where Lain decides it's time to start eating healthy, before catching up with good buddy Scotty Stoky.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Green Turtle Cay, Bahamas - White Marlin Under The Birds!
programme.desc: George and Carl head offshore for billfish at the Green Turtle Club Resort and Marina.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Bridges
programme.desc: Jared and Brent Flack-Davidson battle it out with a beast in Islamorada.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Take A Soldier Fishing
programme.desc: Rick meets the meets the Florida Insider Fishing Report crew to take a soldier fishing.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Bart's First Defeat
programme.desc: A fire captain who witnessed his best friend get attacked by a grizzly returns to face his greatest fear. A champion bull rider discovers his threshold for pain against an apex predator and a Polynesian fire dancer stuns Bart with his first ever defeat.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Nothin' But Mammals ...
programme.desc: A triathlete, a former football player, and an elite bow hunter compete face to face with three of America's most powerful land predators. As the humans attempt to claim the last coveted spot in next week's finale, one sets a stunning new course record.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Morgan's Lost Gold
programme.desc: Josh dives into the Lajas Reef off Panama's coast in search for treasure chests on the sunken flagship of legendary pirate Captain Morgan. His journey takes him to Panama City and he visits the Panama Canal, a modern marvel.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates joins the hunt for a $2,000,000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Who Will Write Our History
programme.desc: Who Will Write Our History tells the story of a clandestine group of journalists, scholars, and activists in the Warsaw Ghetto who created a secret, buried archive so that truth would survive, even if they did not.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Owned by the Roaches
programme.desc: Celia is a psychologist who helps other but can't solve her own hoarding problem. She is losing the battle against her stuff and the millions of roaches infesting her home.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Oh My God! Welcome to My Home!
programme.desc: Randy officially kicks off his 'SAY YES AMERICA' tour. When he shows up at unsuspecting Katie's front door she gets the shock of her life. Bride Dana wants to flash her tats on the wedding day but her conservative entourage won't go down without a fight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Met My Fiance in Jail
programme.desc: With only nine weeks to go until America's wedding, Randy goes undercover to surprise a police officer and his bride-to-be.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not with Those Chubby Arms
programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown but her mom thinks her arms are 'too chubby' to be seen! Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bionic Bride
programme.desc: Crystal and her sisters have some severe sibling rivalry. Will she be able to rise above it to find the perfect dress? Rebekah is known as the bionic model because of her prosthetic arm. Randy makes it his mission to find her a dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown but her mom thinks her arms are 'too chubby' to be seen! Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony.

programme.desc: Crystal and her sisters have some severe sibling rivalry. Will she be able to rise above it to find the perfect dress? Rebekah is known as the bionic model because of her prosthetic arm. Randy makes it his mission to find her a dress.

programme.title: Love, Lust or Run: Kelly
programme.desc: Kelly is a single mother of two with a homegrown fashion line, but buyers will not take her seriously because of her outrageous style.

programme.title: Love, Lust or Run: Tracy
programme.desc: Tracy is a 35-year old nurse whose obsession with femininity has her dressing in head-to-toe vintage, leading people to not take her seriously.

programme.desc: When Hayley Paige, the highly sought-after bridal designer takes on 'The Bachelorette's Kaitlyn Bristowe's wedding dress, a design challenge is born as Hayley's interns compete against one another to impress the celebrity with their own innovative styles.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Queen for the Day
programme.desc: Nicole leaves her six-month-old quadruplets at home while she shops for a gown for her destination wedding. Margo, who lost all her hair due to cancer treatments, comes to the salon to find the perfect dress that makes her feel beautiful inside and out.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Showing Off Your Assets
programme.desc: Emily wants to look ultra-sexy on her big day despite her mom's traditional requests. Aja is searching for a dress that shows off her curves, but struggles to impress her opinionated entourage. Courtney hopes her new chest will fill out her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Money, More Problems
programme.desc: Having recently eloped, Lauren wants an ultra-sexy dress to wear to her family reception.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sister Act!
programme.desc: Samantha is a triplet whose opinionated sisters want to make the final dress decision! Sisters Jessica and Kristen shop together to find they have surprisingly similar tastes. Amy opted for a more modest dress, but is having second thoughts.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side
programme.desc: Miss USA Erin Brady is ready to find her dream dress, but she must also please her mother-in-law.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Style Therapy
programme.desc: Edgy bride Callie is more concerned with pleasing her mom than sticking to her own style.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: J.T.'s Story
programme.desc: J.T. is almost 900lbs with a 100-lb lymphedema mass on his leg and a food addiction that is bound to kill him if he doesn't change. His girlfriend takes him to Houston, but when his behavior drives her away, J.T. is left with only Dr. Now to help.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: All 12 Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent performs a delicate surgery when she treats a toddler born with 12 toes. Dr. Schaeffer meets a nudist with funky feet, and things get tense during a foot reconstruction procedure when the patient wakes up in the middle of surgery.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Looks Bad, Feels Worse
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent is challenged with a case when a women with giant springs on her shoes enters her office. A man with a rare disease has the largest feet Dr. Schaeffer has ever seen, and an athlete with two different sized feet becomes a difficult surgery.

programme.desc: Annie uses Pony to raise money to stop the sports court from closing; Pony develops a fear of plants.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids behave, so she averts any disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Defying Nature
programme.desc: Weather has a potent arsenal when it comes to tormenting humankind. The extremes weather thrown at us can be tests of our resolve. How will we defy the most powerful forces of nature?

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Whole Lot of Faith
programme.desc: Toronto is gridlocked by a massive wreck scene; Sonny becomes a mentor when a high-pressure job goes wrong; Onne and crew work to save a trailer that's going to tear apart.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: There Is Nothing Else
programme.desc: Gary and team deal with a tanker wreck that spits sparks and spills fuel; Steve's crew has to get a tall tractor off the highway.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Only One Shot
programme.desc: When a bridge collapses in a river, it's up to the Ross crew to execute the biggest, most complex job of the season, with an entire town turning up to watch; one of North America's youngest rotator operators gets in over his head.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: We're Not Safe Here
programme.desc: Collin's first shot at his first solo heavy recovery comes with a nasty surprise; Bubba fights a fuel leak and a buckling trailer.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Chain Saw
programme.desc: Al Quiring and sons become heavy rescue lumberjacks when a dump truck and trailer crash into a dense bush. Gord Boyd helps Team Green overcome environmental obstacles and a twisted wreck trapped in the trees.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Between Life and Death
programme.desc: Andrew's sister joins the crew for her first recovery, but gets more excitement than expected; Eric works in a tight space to keep his crew safe; Collin has an once-in-a-lifetime job go wrong.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Beat Up and Bloody
programme.desc: During a springtime ice storm, Bubba battles his most stubborn wreck. Sonny improvises to clear a pile of heavy steel beams. Gary puts second thoughts aside when a flammable tanker plummets from an on-ramp.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Mountain Breaker
programme.desc: The 8050 walking dragline is one of the largest digging machines on the North American continent. Then, a Sno-Cat ATV is used to get to a weather radar station on the top of a mountain in Colorado.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Chopper Loggers
programme.desc: The Boeing Vertol heavy life helicopter is the civilian version of the US military's legendary Chinook chopper.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Wrecking Crew
programme.desc: A team of engineers is determined to keep the lights on for an isolated Ontario community by using a pole-setter adapted from the body of a Hitachi 240 excavator. Also, Voith-Schneider super tugs are examined.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Hercules
programme.desc: The Prinoth Panther is the ultimate all-terrain, multi-purpose work vehicle. It’s a crane, it’s a tractor, it’s a digger, it’s anything you need it to be. Then, a construction company is building an underground pipeline using the Tesmec 1075 trencher.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Steel vs. Snow
programme.desc: The mightiest mobile digger on the planet, the P&H 4100C, is also known in the mining industry as 'the Boss.' Also, a hybrid machine known as a Feller-Buncher is used for super speed lumber harvesting.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Flood Buster
programme.desc: The mighty Red River is a fearsome threat to all who live along its banks, and only one machine stands between the little town of Selkirk, Manitoba, and devastating floods – the Amphibex amphibious excavator.

programme.title: Top Ten Worst Flash Floods
programme.desc: Flash floods have the power to turn lives into nightmares. Raging walls of water barreling down rivers can sweep you off your feet, lift cars from asphalt, and wash homes from their foundations. We are counting down the top ten worst flash floods.

programme.title: Top Ten Doomsday Disasters
programme.desc: Disasters of apocalyptic proportions - explosions, asteroids and earthquakes. These are the top ten Doomsday disasters that have hit the earth so far.

programme.title: Top Ten Unlucky Locations
programme.desc: With the right meteorological mix, extreme weather can strike anywhere at anytime. Its wrath appears to be random - freak conditions pop up, lash out then leave, but sometimes they come back to the same spot again and again, and these are the top ten.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Raining Spiders
programme.desc: Lightning creates a storm of spiders, freaky weather turns a beach into a winter wonderland, a "weather-bomb" floods a town with eels, plus toxic algae and "Manhattan Henge" on this episode of Strangest Weather on Earth.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ellen and Gloria
programme.desc: The tragic loss of Ellen's husband in the line of duty triggered hoarding through kleptomania. Gloria's family is on the verge of calling the sheriff.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dick and Karen
programme.desc: Dick has hoarded out his girlfriend Sandy's house to the point that the two of them can no longer live in it. Karen started hoarding after the tragic suicide of her oldest son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Judy
programme.desc: Judy's life is a dangerous one of severe contradictions. She is an extreme germaphobe who spends her entire day engaged in sanitization rituals, yet she lives in a severe and extremely filthy hoard overridden with mice that she considers her friends.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roy/ Loretta
programme.desc: Roy is facing $20 million in fines from the county for hoarding hundreds of vehicles on his property. After being robbed at gunpoint, Loretta started to hoard everything in her home.

programme.title: America's Top Dog: Small Dog, Big Bite
Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Movie: Escape Plan

programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dangerously Drinkable
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Amvox 73
programme.desc: Michael unearths a mutant turtle from a mystical Peruvian clay, a woman is blown away when two adorable bunnies become 8 and to top it off, a hapless carpenter becomes an accidental time traveler.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!
programme.desc: Michael shows a caterer the true power of dairy products, and an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite chews through the scenery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: When three friends realize that quitting their jobs isn't an option they conspire to murder their bosses.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael gives a fresh look to your favourite tricks with never-before-seen footage. From the arcade to the science lab, Michael revisits classic moments with footage from the cutting room floor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Two
programme.desc: In this special, a trip down memory lane turns trippy when Michael revisits classic bits, including the hallucinogenic frog and the glue-sniffing mishap, to unlock never-before-seen reactions to your favorite jaw-dropping tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Three
programme.desc: In this special, Michael revisits some of the spookiest bits of Carbonaro past to reveal fresh frights with never-before-seen reactions to tricks, including the alien abduction, musical ghosts and mad science experiments gone wrong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stankin' Up the Joint
programme.desc: Someone has an odd prayer for Yamaneika, Matteo Lane has a hilarious blind date in Italy, and Ronnie Jordan has some tips for the single women at the office. Plus, Corey Rodrigues knows the importance of sunblock at the beach.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love
programme.desc: Brad Williams brings the heat, 'Street Fighter' style, Sydnee Washington has a hot date with Father Time, Yamaneika daydreams about being kidnapped, and Calvin Evans gets less than he bargained for on his no-frills plane ticket.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Anti-protest Protest
programme.desc: The always funny Chaunte Wayans is back to reminisce about an old love, and Dave Helem has a run-in with the anti-gluten brigade. Plus, Pretty Ricki's daughter is spilling tea on the entire congregation.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hack to the Future
programme.desc: Find out one of Brooke's favourite pastimes when she's not hacking. Plus, which lifesaving hack Kevin has used while swimming.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Cookin' Up Some Hacks
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin take hacking to the next level as they uncover the best hacks for cooking pizza and cutting cake. Plus, they’ll show you why bread is a true all-star, and teach some hacks that every parent needs to know.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hack-a-bye Baby
programme.desc: Find out which cop show had an influence on hack 911, what early ice skates were made out of, which old wives' tale is actually true, and which hack Kevin and Brooke thought was a prank.

programme.desc: While on vacation, a girl discovers love and romance with a local dance instructor.

programme.desc: A senatorial candidate falls for a hotel maid who is posing as a wealthy Manhattan socialite.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: Chaos in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Robert Irvine heads back to Padre Rita Grill, where he first met Michael and Cathy Laferty in 2014. He returns to see if leadership has been restored and braces himself to deal with one of the feistiest owners in the show's history.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: At Perella's Ristorante in Warren, R.I., Chef Robert Irvine meets an owner whose stubbornness is holding back his restaurant. He hasn't updated the menu, the decor or his opinions since the place opened 25 years ago.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.desc: Ina Garten loves mixing fancy and casual fare, and she's sharing her secrets to this winning mashup of high and low. She takes everyday potato and celery root puree over the top with truffle butter and serves it with stunning seared scallops.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Big Game Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby Flay offers up brunch recipes and menu ideas for any occasion.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Family-style Game Day
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites an all-star lineup of chef friends to the ranch to cook up grub before watching the big game. Alex Guarnaschelli makes sliders with cheese fondue sauce and Justin Warner puts a Japanese-style twist on his miso grilled corn.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Big Game, Big Flavors!
programme.desc: Football is king, but Valerie Bertinelli is queen of the halftime eats! Her family and friends are over to watch the game, so she's making Italian slow-cooked beef sandwiches served with a giardiniera aioli and an Italian-style fennel cole slaw.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Happy Hour
programme.desc: It's happy hour at the Boarding House that Ree Drummond and her family have opened in Pawhuska, Oklahoma, and she is surprising guests with a fantastic cocktail hour spread.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girl Time and Burger Time
programme.desc: The cowgirls enjoy pasta primavera before making bacon cheeseburgers for everyone.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Indoor Grilling
programme.desc: It's all about indoor grilling with four of Ree Drummond's favorites from down the years. She's cooking up Spicy Sausage Dogs for the family, then throwing juicy patties and pineapple on the grill for totally over-the-top Hawaiian Burgers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ranch Games
programme.desc: The family that plays together stays together. Ree, Ladd and the extended family get together for some good ol' friendly ranch style sporting competition. Afterwards, there's tangy tomato brisket, onion strings, and cheesy, blanched broccoli.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Chinese Family Favorites
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making some of her favourite Chinese-inspired recipes, including some passed down from her dad's family. He's flying in with Molly's Aunt Lucy to visit her and baby Bernie, so Molly makes them her grandma's sweet and sour tepong pork.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Welcome Home, Newlyweds!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is preparing a welcome home meal to deliver to her best friend Suzanne's son and his wife, who are returning from their honeymoon.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Miss Brown's Little Helpers
programme.desc: It's Aunt Kardea's day to hang out with some of her nieces and nephew, and she makes their favourite things along with a couple of sweet treats.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: TV Dinner
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts her friends for an evening of cozy television-viewing, and she makes a hearty menu of small bites that are easy to eat in front of the TV. Giada provides blankets, pillows and an individual TV tray for each guest.

programme.title: The Kitchen: College Homecoming
programme.desc: The Kitchen is whipping up top tailgating dishes for college homecoming parties, starting with Jeff Mauro's extra extra large eggplant parmesan sandwich and Katie Lee's chorizo and cheese loaded fries.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: It Grows
programme.desc: As everyone celebrates Valentino for growing his first facial hair, a jealous Vic resorts to magical methods to grow a mustache and compete for attention.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: A New Don
programme.desc: When Vic and Val discover that Don isn’t really himself it’s up to them to use his kooky codex of conspiracies to save him.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Churro Kings
programme.desc: When Vic & Val start making good money from selling churros at the taco stand, their lust for stuff makes them do dirty tricks to take out their competition.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Know It All
programme.desc: When Vic accidently unleashes evil bats from a cave, it’s up to the boys and Don to protect the town, but Vic’s know-it-all attitude keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious figure from Nicole’s past shows up and challenges her to a fight, but the kids are surprised when she refuses.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Compilation
programme.desc: The best of Elmore Stream.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Singing
programme.desc: Mr Small feels that he hasn’t inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Puppets
programme.desc: Darwin is delighted when they discover their old childhood toys, but soon realizes that some things are best left in the past.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Apple's Formula
programme.desc: Apple needs to find a funny formula that will land him a comedic in a movie.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Selfish Shellfish
programme.desc: Apple and Onion have to prove that they’re not selfish when they do their good deeds.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Fun Proof
programme.desc: Apple and Onion want to become this week's 'Most Fun People.'

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Party Popper
programme.desc: Apple and Onion's party plans are interrupted by a grumpy guest.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: The Scoop on U.A. Class 1-A
programme.desc: Reporter Taneo Tokuda investigates U.A. Class 1-A at the dorms, after All Might announces his retirement.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Overhaul
programme.desc: Overhaul meets with Shigaraki in order to propose an alliance that ends badly for the two sides.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Art Crawl
programme.desc: When Linda asks Bob to let her sister hang her paintings in the restaurant for Art Week, Bob finds he's forced to contend with the city's Art Council.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Spaghetti Western and Meatballs
programme.desc: When Bob and Gene start watching Spaghetti Westerns, they wind up alienating Louise. Gene takes pointers from the films on how to deal with his archrival at school.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Peanut Butter Kid
programme.desc: When their bank accounts begin to run dry, the Griffins look for ways to make money. Stewie gets cast in a peanut butter commercial and becomes the money maker for the family.

programme.title: Family Guy: Scammed Yankees
programme.desc: Lois and her mom, Babs, have a relaxing spa day, leaving Peter to entertain Lois' father, Carter. The boys fall for an email scam, and have to go to Africa to get their money back. Meanwhile, Brian pursues Meg's friend, Patty.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Temp Squad
programme.desc: The Hassaikai gets some help from the League of Villains as the heroes continue to make their way to Chisaki to rescue Eri.

programme.title: Dr. Stone: The Age of Energy
programme.desc: Work begins on creating the components for Senku's cell phone, but spinning gold wire is proving to be quite the task. Luckily, Chrome and Kaseki invent the water wheel and drastically improve the process.

programme.title: Sword Art Online: Alicization War of Underworld: Raids
programme.desc: A force from the Dark Territory launches an attack on Rulid Village. Alice rushes over on her dragon, Amayori. There she finds the villagers unable to flee because the Taboo Index prevents them from defying the Chief Man-at-Arms’ orders.

programme.title: Fire Force: Smile
programme.desc: Shinra revisits his childhood to share his memories with Sho, to try to forge a deeper connection. Plus, the members of the 8th rally to rescue one of their own who is critically injured and turn to Captain Huang of the 6th for assistance.

programme.title: Food Wars! Shokugeki no Soma: Interplay of Light and Shadow
programme.desc: With resolve and her newfound ability to keep a cool head, Megumi prepares to face Ryo in the next battle: ramen. These opposite personalities clash through their dishes.

programme.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba: Something More Important Than Life
programme.desc: Tanjiro's world keeps spinning as Kyogai's tsuzumi commands gravity itself with every beat, driving Tanjiro up the wall.

programme.title: Black Clover: Two Miracles
programme.desc: As Asta and Yuno battle a Poison Plant mage, Sister Lily recalls the letters they would send home. Later, the priest is in a bad way and Astra's sword may be able to help.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind: Narancia's Li'l Bomber
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio's body-shrinking attack.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: The Allied Mom Force!!
programme.desc: Konohamaru is eager to guard the village but is quickly discouraged by the adults who tell him to just go about his day as usual, but Konohamaru suspects that an enemy might be planning to attack the village.

programme.title: The Promised Neverland: 291045
programme.desc: Emma, Norman, and Ray figure out that there may be a traitor among the children, an informant for Mom. As Norman attempts to solve this mystery, Emma notices something strange about Gilda.

programme.title: Attack on Titan: Idol: The Struggle for Trost, Part 7
programme.desc: Plans are created to use Eren's Titan powers to seal the hole in the wall in an attempt reclaim Trost.

programme.title: Superjail: Superfail
programme.desc: The outside looks like a volcano, but the inside is a psychedelic alternate universe.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Shooting Star Named Gaz Digzy Falls Fast and Hard
programme.desc: A lifetime of partying takes an unexpected turn when Gaz Digzy experiences the wildest night of her superstar life.

programme.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force: Rabbot Redux
programme.desc: Three unique detectives share a rental house in New Jersey and solve mysteries.

programme.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force: Hands on a Hamburger
programme.desc: The teens compete in a contest at a suspicious burger chain.

programme.title: Samurai Jack: Jack and the Flying Prince and Princess
programme.desc: Samurai Jack travels in search of a time portal that can transport him back home.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Future
programme.desc: Banana Joe’s Mom can predict the future, but she can’t predict her own disappearance.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Spinoffs
programme.desc: Rob creates a variety of spinoff Elmore shows and formats in order to replace Gumball.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Silence
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin may have run out of things to say to each other.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potion
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin use a magic potion to shrink Hector.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Beast Girl
programme.desc: As the Titans deal with Madame Rouge, Beast Boy is excited to meet his female counterpart Beast Girl.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Scoop
programme.desc: Starfire befriends an ice cream scoop and steals it from the HIVE's ice cream social. The rest of the titans show concern over her love of inanimate objects.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 3
programme.desc: Batman would rather watch TV then go to his own birthday party. Beast Boy and Cyborg act as Knight Rider.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Chicken in the Cradle
programme.desc: Beast Boy lays an egg, but instead of taking care of his newly-hatched chick he goofs off and lets the others deal with it.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Bro-pocalypse
programme.desc: When the male Titans are injured, Raven and Starfire must become bros to stop the Bropocalypse.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Fight
programme.desc: Robin tries to teach the other Titans about real estate, but they're only interested in finding a villain to fight.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Hot Salad Water
programme.desc: When drinking tea turns the other Titans English, it's up to Robin to save America from another British invasion.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Quantum Fun
programme.desc: Robin takes the other Titans on a trip through the dizzying world of quantum physics.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Brain Percentages
programme.desc: A desire to find the hidden images in a puzzle finds Beast Boy learning to use more than ten percent of his brain.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Tower Renovation
programme.desc: The Titans after 'Teen Titans Go! To the Movies'.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Flashback
programme.desc: A flashback to how the Teen Titans first formed.

programme.title: Ben 10: Ben in Rome
programme.desc: Ben Tennyson discovers a curious watch that allows him to transform into different aliens.

programme.title: Power Players: The Best Team
programme.desc: When Madcap and his minions crash a soapbox derby, the team must stop the baddies and help Axel, stuck in a car with Luka, cross the finish line.

programme.title: Power Players: Joyride
programme.desc: At a rummage sale with Uncle Andrew, Axel and Zoe must stop Madcap from turning her long-lost tank toy, Joyride, into an agent of mayhem.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Kabooms
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Genie President
programme.desc: Robin hatches a plan to get rich off pennies, but Starfire believes they are magical.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Power of Shrimps
programme.desc: Aqualad uses shrimps and prime rib to try to win back Raven.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Little Elvis
programme.desc: The Titans team up with Shazam in order to defeat the evil Mr. Mind.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: My Name is Jose
programme.desc: The Titans have Raven give them new super powers but have a hard time adjusting.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Groover
programme.desc: Robin takes the Titans on an educational trip to the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Real Orangins!
programme.desc: Robin tries again to tell the REAL origin story of the Teen Titans.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stories
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stars
programme.desc: Dad gets a free haircut after giving Larry’s hairdresser a bad review, which inspires Gumball and Darwin to go on a reviewing spree in order to receive more free stuff.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Guy
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sucker
programme.desc: Darwin ends up in detention with the Bomb Kid, who decides to make Darwin his new target.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Boredom
programme.desc: The citizens of Elmore are feeling down because it’s January, so Gumball and Anais invent a new holiday called Sluzzle Tag.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vision
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Grades
programme.desc: Miss Simian is amused when a failed test from Gumball's past brings down his grade point average, which means that he'll have to repeat kindergarten.

programme.title: Unikitty!: Brock Most Wanted
programme.desc: As ruler of the kingdom, Unikitty has busy days full of royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Unikitty!: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Unikitty and Dr. Fox try to overload boring Richard with emotions.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #TheGoodTheBadAndTheBizarre
programme.desc: Everything is going well for Kara Danvers, both as a teen and a superhero, until she starts taking the blame for things she didn’t do, and the arrival of a new supervillain threatens to destroy Supergirl’s hard-earned reputation.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #Abracadabrapalooza
programme.desc: Diana, Kara, and Barbara do more than save citizens from Super-Villains.

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween V
programme.desc: Dan pulls a Halloween trick on Nancy to convince her of his friendship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Homeward Bound
programme.desc: Roseanne is suspicious when David moves out of the Conner household upon Darlene's impromptu visit. DJ experiences puberty.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Worry, Speed Racer
programme.desc: When Jake tells Charlie and Alan that he often overhears his mother and Herb having sex, it triggers a repressed memory for Charlie. Rose tries to help Charlie work through the problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That's Summer Sausage, Not Salami
programme.desc: After getting to know Danielle, Charlie discovers that she shares some common interests with Alan and proceeds to set them up, but when things begin to heat up between them, Charlie becomes jealous.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Damn Stalker
programme.desc: When Rose announces she is moving to London, Charlie must face his true feelings for her. Meanwhile, Alan fudges his profile on an Internet dating service, attracting a fellow profile embellisher, Beverly.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Merely Slept With a Commie
programme.desc: When Evelyn expresses sympathy for a friend who had no mourners at her funeral, Alan and Charlie inform her that she's headed for the same fate. Instead of taking their comments as a motive to change, she cunningly makes them regret what they said.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville
programme.desc: When Jake starts covering his walls with posters of sexy women, Alan feels pressure to make the most of what little childhood his son has left. Meanwhile, Kandi embarks on a new career as an actress.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smooth as a Ken Doll
programme.desc: As Judith and Herb's wedding nears, Charlie gets a bit too close to Herb's witty sister.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Aunt Myra Doesn't Pee a Lot
programme.desc: Alan prepares Jake for Judith's wedding, while Charlie continues his fling with Herb's sister Myra.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tucked, Taped and Gorgeous
programme.desc: Alan befriends Greg, a gay single dad, causing Alan and Charlie to re-examine their own sexual identities. Meanwhile, Jake has a crush on Greg's daughter, Sophie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. McGlue's Feedbag
programme.desc: Jake comes into a windfall when Charlie takes him to the track, and Alan is stuck in that special hell known as the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Anteaters. They're Just Crazy-Lookin
programme.desc: Charlie loses a girl to a young, handsome handyman who is doing repairs at his house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Prostitutes and Gelato
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan must confront their 'daddy issues' when Evelyn's new boyfriend invites them to Las Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Media Room Slash Dungeon
programme.desc: Charlie reacts oddly after an evening with his mother, and Alan's date reacts oddly after having sex with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo
programme.desc: Suffering from 'bimbo fatigue,' Charlie lets Alan set him up with a woman his own age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Putting Swim Fins on a Cat
programme.desc: Charlie has to find creative ways to entertain his girlfriend's four-year-old son while Alan becomes a human guinea pig.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Help Daddy Find His Toenail
programme.desc: Charlie's girlfriend is embarrassed to be seen with him in public. Meanwhile, Jake sneaks out to a concert despite Alan's forbiddance.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Leather Gear Is in the Guest Room
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan butt heads over Alan's place in the house, prompting Alan and Jake to move in with Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Is There a Mrs. Waffles?
programme.desc: Children's music will never be the same after Charlie becomes an unlikely children's music sensation. When he refuses to perform at a concert, his record promoter threatens to sue him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Unidentified Funk

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Happy Endings

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood

programme.title: Movie: Room for Murder

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Screaming Room: The Ex-Files
programme.desc: Emotions run as high as the guys recount their investigation of Goatman's Bridge, where Jay suffered a heartbreaking personal loss and both Zak and Aaron were affected by a dark, otherworldly presence.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: The Montauk Monster and More
programme.desc: An internet-famous monster washes up again on a New York beach, parents catch ghosts haunting nurseries on baby monitors and a UFO saves a Russian town.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Fairfield County Infirmary
programme.desc: The team's terrifying road trip takes them to a house of horrors in Lancaster, Ohio. When Dakota tasks each member to explore the property all alone, Alex encounters something so evil it wouldn't be believed if not caught on video.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Pennhurst State School
programme.desc: The team faces their biggest paranormal challenge yet when they roll up to an abandoned asylum in Spring City, Pennsylvania. The hissing, violent entities within leave them wondering if they'll ever return home from their terrifying road trip.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Monster Madness
programme.desc: Nightmares come to life in a collection of the most captivating monster encounters ever documented, including Bigfoot caught on camera, a crazed cryptid on the attack in Oregon and a sea monster washes ashore in the Philippines.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Rise of the Monsters
programme.desc: A menagerie of nightmares manifest in a truly terrifying collection of monster encounters, including a prehistoric terror from above, a shadowy backyard beast and a creepy cave cryptid.

programme.title: Killer Yeti in Russia

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Movie: Dear John
programme.desc: While on leave, a soldier returns to his hometown where he falls in love with a student. Once the soldier returns to the army, they attempt to continue their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The life of country music star Johnny Cash. After serving in the air force in Germany, Cash buys a guitar and begins touring. He develops a drug habit, but after getting divorced, he is eased off his addiction by June Carter, whom he eventually marries.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.
